What happens next

  • We review the address and what you are trying to decide.
  • We point you toward the public records worth checking first.
  • If the issue looks deeper, we will recommend the $149 Permit Review Plus.

Express Permit Review Plus
$300 when available

Target turnaround is 4 business hours or less when scheduling and source access allow.

Request Express Review

PermitPulse also tracks public-record signals through the Red Tape Index, Radar, and Top Permits pages. See who it helps.

PermitPulse is a first-pass public-record review. It is not a legal opinion, architectural opinion, title report, survey, code determination, permit expeditor service, or permit approval guarantee.

Availability note

Express availability depends on request time, property complexity, source availability, and public portal access.

PermitPulse is not legal, architectural, engineering, survey, or permit approval advice.
